title.en: The LLC Encapsulation EtherType Fix: Clause 12.2 for LPD Media
title.zh: LLC 封装 EtherType 修正：面向 LPD 媒体的 12.2 条款

blocks.en: This lesson teaches a single, very focused piece of standards work: IEEE Std 802.1AC-2016/Cor 1-2018, the first Corrigendum to the MAC Service Definition. A corrigendum (plural corrigenda) is a tiny correction document — it does not introduce new features, it fixes a defect in an already-published standard. This one touches exactly one place: Clause 12.2, where it swaps a single number in a table.
blocks.zh: 本课讲解一项非常聚焦的标准工作：IEEE Std 802.1AC-2016/Cor 1-2018，即 MAC 服务定义（MAC Service Definition）的第一份勘误。勘误（corrigendum，复数 corrigenda）是一份极小的更正文件——它不引入新功能，只修复已发布标准中的缺陷。本勘误只触及一处：第 12.2 条款，在一张表中替换了一个数字。

blocks.en: To understand what is being fixed, first define the vocabulary. The MAC (Media Access Control) service is the abstract interface a bridge or end station offers to the layers above it. One of its primitives is M_UNITDATA.indication — the event 'a frame has arrived for you.' LPD media (Locally-unique Protocol Discrimination media) are the kinds of LAN media where the protocol of a frame is not always carried by a simple EtherType field; sometimes it is carried using an LLC (Logical Link Control) header instead. Clause 12.2 describes how an incoming frame on such media is transformed into the parameters of an M_UNITDATA.indication.
blocks.zh: 要理解修复的内容，先定义术语。MAC（Media Access Control，媒体访问控制）服务是网桥或端站向其上层提供的抽象接口。它的一个原语是 M_UNITDATA.indication——表示「有一帧到达、是给你的」这一事件。LPD 媒体（Locally-unique Protocol Discrimination media，本地唯一协议鉴别媒体）是这样一类局域网媒体：帧所属的协议并不总是由一个简单的 EtherType 字段携带，有时改由一个 LLC（Logical Link Control，逻辑链路控制）头部来携带。第 12.2 条款描述了在这类媒体上收到的帧如何被转换成 M_UNITDATA.indication 的参数。

blocks.en: Here is the crux. An EtherType is a 16-bit number that says 'this frame carries this protocol' (for example, IPv4 is 08-00). When a protocol does not have its own EtherType and instead arrives wrapped in an LLC header, 802.1AC needs a way to represent that LLC-encapsulated traffic using the same EtherType machinery, so that everything above the MAC service sees a consistent picture. For this it reserves one special value — the LLC encapsulation EtherType — recorded in Table 12-2. The 2016 revision of 802.1AC first introduced this table. The Corrigendum's whole job is to correct the value in it.
blocks.zh: 关键在此。EtherType 是一个 16 位数字，表示「本帧携带某协议」（例如 IPv4 是 08-00）。当某协议没有自己的 EtherType、而是裹在一个 LLC 头部里到达时，802.1AC 需要一种办法用同一套 EtherType 机制来表示这类经 LLC 封装的流量，从而让 MAC 服务之上的一切看到一致的图景。为此它保留了一个特殊值——LLC 封装 EtherType——记录在表 12-2 中。802.1AC 的 2016 修订版首次引入了这张表。本勘误的全部任务就是更正其中的取值。

blocks.en: Why did the value need fixing? The committee wanted to use EtherType 88-70, which was already assigned to someone for this exact purpose. They tried to contact that assignee for permission but could not reach them in time, so the 2016 standard was published with a placeholder value, C9-D1. After publication, the original assignee granted permission to use 88-70 — so this Corrigendum substitutes 88-70 back in, avoiding two different numbers for the same job out in the field (an interoperability hazard).
blocks.zh: 为什么这个值需要修正？委员会想使用 EtherType 88-70，它本就为这一用途分配给了某方。他们试图联系该被分配方以取得许可，但未能及时联系上，于是 2016 版标准以占位值 C9-D1 发布。发布之后，原被分配方批准使用 88-70——因此本勘误把 88-70 替换回来，避免现场出现两个不同数字干同一件事（这是互操作性隐患）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="10" y="20" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">Table 12-2 — LLC encapsulation EtherType</text><rect x="10" y="35" width="280" height="28"/><text x="20" y="53" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">Assignment</text><rect x="290" y="35" width="120" height="28"/><text x="300" y="53" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">Value</text><rect x="10" y="63" width="280" height="28"/><text x="20" y="81" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">LLC encapsulation EtherType</text><rect x="290" y="63" width="120" height="28"/><text x="300" y="81" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12" text-decoration="line-through">C9-D1</text><text x="352" y="81" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="13" font-weight="bold">88-70</text><text x="10" y="120" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">Strikethrough = removed (old placeholder)</text><text x="10" y="137" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">Bold = inserted (corrected value)</text></svg>

caption.en: Table 12-2 after the Corrigendum: the placeholder C9-D1 is struck through and 88-70 is substituted as the LLC encapsulation EtherType.
caption.zh: 勘误后的表 12-2：占位值 C9-D1 被划除，88-70 被替换为 LLC 封装 EtherType。

blocks.en: Standards corrections are written as 'editing instructions' rather than full rewrites. Four verbs are used: change, delete, insert, and replace. Removed text is shown with strikethrough, added text with underscore. This Corrigendum uses just two of them: it changes Table 12-2 (strike C9-D1, add 88-70), and it inserts a new explanatory NOTE 2, renumbering the pre-existing note as NOTE 1. Notes, by IEEE convention, are informative only — they explain, they never impose requirements.
blocks.zh: 标准更正以「编辑指令」的形式书写，而非整篇重写。共用四个动词：change（更改）、delete（删除）、insert（插入）、replace（替换）。被删文字以删除线标出，新增文字以下划线标出。本勘误只用到其中两个：它 change（更改）表 12-2（划除 C9-D1，加入 88-70），并 insert（插入）一条新的说明性 NOTE 2，同时把原有的注释重新编号为 NOTE 1。按 IEEE 惯例，注释仅为信息性内容——它们只作解释，从不施加强制要求。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Frame arrives on LPD media] --> B{Carries own EtherType?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Use that EtherType]
  B -->|No: LLC-encapsulated| D[Apply LLC encapsulation EtherType 88-70]
  C --> E[M_UNITDATA.indication]
  D --> E
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[帧到达 LPD 媒体] --> B{自带 EtherType?}
  B -->|是| C[使用该 EtherType]
  B -->|否: 经 LLC 封装| D[套用 LLC 封装 EtherType 88-70]
  C --> E[M_UNITDATA.indication]
  D --> E

blocks.en: Reading the flow above: when a frame arrives on LPD media, Clause 12.2's transformation decides which EtherType value should appear in the resulting M_UNITDATA.indication. If the frame already carries a real EtherType, that value is used directly. If instead it is LLC-encapsulated traffic with no native EtherType, the single reserved LLC encapsulation EtherType — now 88-70 — stands in. Either way, the layer receiving the indication sees one uniform 'protocol type' parameter, which is exactly the point of having the MAC service abstract away media differences.
blocks.zh: 解读上图：当一帧到达 LPD 媒体时，第 12.2 条款的转换决定在生成的 M_UNITDATA.indication 中应出现哪个 EtherType 值。如果帧本身已携带真实的 EtherType，就直接使用该值。如果它是经 LLC 封装、没有原生 EtherType 的流量，则由那个唯一保留的 LLC 封装 EtherType——现在是 88-70——来顶替。无论哪种情况，接收该指示的层都会看到一个统一的「协议类型」参数，而这正是 MAC 服务把媒体差异抽象掉的意义所在。

blocks.en: Mental model: think of the LLC encapsulation EtherType as a single 'this came in wrapped in LLC' badge. Before, two LANs could be wearing different badges (C9-D1 vs 88-70) for the same condition, and would not recognize each other. The Corrigendum makes everyone wear 88-70 — one badge, one meaning, full interoperability.
blocks.zh: 心智模型：把 LLC 封装 EtherType 想象成一枚统一的「我是裹在 LLC 里进来的」徽章。在此之前，两个局域网可能为同一种情况佩戴不同的徽章（C9-D1 与 88-70），从而互不相认。本勘误让所有人都佩戴 88-70——一枚徽章、一个含义、完全互操作。

summary.en: Coverage map: exactly what 12.2 says and where
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：12.2 究竟说了什么、在哪里

blocks.en: Clause 12 (Protocol discrimination and media) of the base standard hosts the rules for mapping media-level framing to the MAC service. This Corrigendum modifies only Clause 12.2 (M_UNITDATA.indication data transformation for LPD media). Two edits land here, both on the same printed page. First, a 'change' to Table 12-2 (LLC encapsulation EtherType): the row 'LLC encapsulation EtherType' has its Value cell changed from C9-D1 to 88-70. Second, an 'insert' of NOTE 2 directly after the existing note (which is renumbered NOTE 1); NOTE 2 records that the 2016 revision added this EtherType, that contacting the assignee of 88-70 had failed so C9-D1 was published, and that the assignee subsequently granted permission, prompting the substitution to avoid interoperability issues. That is the complete substantive content of 12.2 as amended — there is no additional normative text, no new primitive, and no change to the M_UNITDATA.indication parameters themselves beyond which value Table 12-2 supplies.
blocks.zh: 基础标准的第 12 条款（Protocol discrimination and media，协议鉴别与媒体）承载着把媒体层成帧映射到 MAC 服务的规则。本勘误仅修改第 12.2 条款（M_UNITDATA.indication data transformation for LPD media，面向 LPD 媒体的 M_UNITDATA.indication 数据转换）。这里落地两处编辑，且都在同一印刷页上。其一，对表 12-2（LLC encapsulation EtherType）执行「change（更改）」：「LLC encapsulation EtherType」这一行的取值单元从 C9-D1 改为 88-70。其二，在原有注释之后「insert（插入）」一条 NOTE 2（原注释被重新编号为 NOTE 1）；NOTE 2 记载：2016 修订版新增了这个 EtherType，联系 88-70 的被分配方未果故以 C9-D1 发布，随后被分配方批准使用，于是作此替换以避免互操作性问题。这就是修订后 12.2 的全部实质内容——没有额外的规范性文字，没有新原语，除了表 12-2 所提供的取值之外，M_UNITDATA.indication 参数本身也没有任何改变。

blocks.en: So, in one sentence: Clause 12.2 of 802.1AC-2016/Cor 1-2018 corrects the LLC encapsulation EtherType used when transforming an LLC-encapsulated frame on LPD media into an M_UNITDATA.indication, replacing the placeholder C9-D1 with the properly assigned 88-70. Small in size, but exactly the sort of fix that keeps independent implementations talking to one another.
blocks.zh: 一句话总结：802.1AC-2016/Cor 1-2018 的第 12.2 条款更正了在把 LPD 媒体上经 LLC 封装的帧转换为 M_UNITDATA.indication 时所用的 LLC 封装 EtherType，将占位值 C9-D1 替换为正式分配的 88-70。改动虽小，却正是让各自独立的实现能够彼此对话的那类修复。

cites.note: p.12 carries the Clause 12 heading, Clause 12.2, the change to Table 12-2 (C9-D1 -> 88-70), and inserted NOTE 2; p.11 explains the editing-instruction conventions (change/delete/insert/replace, strikethrough/underscore) and the corrigendum's basis.
